description: Multiple failed login attempts for user admin from IP 89.23.74.19 detected in Apache logs
notes: T1110 - Brute Force. Exact match for password brute force.

description: SQL injection attempt detected in HTTP request: OR 1=1 DROP TABLE users
notes: T1190 - Exploit Public-Facing Application. SQL injection in web application.

description: User executed sudo command to gain root privileges without proper authorization
notes: T1548 - Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism. sudo = elevation.

description: Remote connection to internal server 192.168.1.50 via RDP protocol
notes: T1021 - Remote Services. RDP = remote service. Exact match.

description: New Windows service created with executable at path C:\temp\malware.exe
notes: T1543 - Create or Modify System Process. Service creation = persistence.

description: Process injection detected: malicious code injected into legitimate process memory
PowerShell script executed with EncodedCommand parameter: -EncodedCommand aQB2AHg...
notes: T1059 - Command and Scripting Interpreter. PowerShell execution.

description: Discovery commands executed: whoami, net user, systeminfo in rapid succession
notes: T1033 - System Owner/User Discovery. whoami = discovery.

description: Large volume of data uploaded to external FTP server using encrypted connection
notes: T1048 - Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol. FTP = alternative protocol.

description: Periodic HTTPS C2 communication with domain malicious-c2.example.com with encoded payload
notes: T1071 - Application Layer Protocol. HTTPS C2 communication.
